sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n113046" key="xalke/nteros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χαλκ-έντερος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n113046.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of brazen bowels,</tr_> applied by <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> to the Grammarian Didymus.</sense> </entryFree>
